description: Full market-as-maker ZK prediction-market flow, validated live: private orders -> ZK-proven batch moves the public LMSR odds trustlessly -> resolve -> private, relayer-submitted redeem where the winning order is paid by the pool. Individual order side/amount stay hidden throughout.

2_submit_batch.auth: pool paid the market via authorize_as_current_contract

flow.3_resolve: Yes (market funded with a b*ln2 buffer to pass its solvency guard)

notes: Batch amounts are raw for this test (net LMSR cost ~0); a visible/economically-meaningful demo uses fixed-point share amounts. Payout is settled from the pool (parimutuel-style escrow) with the market as odds engine + outcome source. Unaudited research prototype, testnet only.
